docTitle: Naksa te Bible · Mitʼ Scroll re Bible
metaDesc: Purạn Niyom reakʼ okte hor, Jisu reakʼ jiwi ar Pạul reakʼ cạlạu do sạri naksare atiꞌ me — Bible do sạri ṭhạukorege hoyena.

s.title: Naksa te Bible
s.verse: “Aboren Probhu Jisuakʼ daṛe ar uniyakʼ hijukʼ reaṅ baḍae ocopere benaoakʼ jãhãn golpo do bale lại akada; ale do uniyakʼ ṭhonok nij mẽtʼtele ńelakada.” (2 Petrus 1:16)
s.purpose: Bible do uphonạs do baṅa. Noa do sạri ṭhạu, mãhã ar ńutumre cạlạu akan hoṛko reakʼ biboron kana. Ona horko naksare, okte lekate ńelme — mitʼ ṭhạure tep meꞌ, se ▶ ọtạ meꞌ dhạp dhạpteye parom.
s.ot_lead: Mitʼ eskar cạlạu do baṅ bickom sirjon khon ehopʼ bańcao-itihạs reakʼ hor: sirjon ar gisạu → daꞌ bạṛ ar Babel → mitʼ haka (Abraham) → bachan reakʼ disạm → Misor khon Oḍokʼ → ọtạr → jit → rajosṭi → haṭiń → bandi okol → ruạṛ.
s.je_kick: ② Nãwa Niyom — Jisu reakʼ jiwi
s.je_lead: Susamacarko oka lekateko oleda ona lekate Jisu reakʼ jiwi hore atiꞌ me — Betlehemre janam khon bodredạn ar Galil kạmi hotete, Samariạ parom, Jerusalemre kurus, aronaꞌ jiwit ar sorge rakapʼ hạbicʼ.
s.pa_kick: ③ Nãwa Niyom — Pạul reakʼ cạlạu
s.pa_h: Antiokia khon dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ simạ hạbicʼ — Rom
s.pa_lead: Jerusalemre Pentekost khon, susamacar celeka Jihudạ parom pasnaoena — Huḍiń Asia ar Europ hotete raj reakʼ mon hạbicʼ. Mọ̃ṛɛ̃ cạlạu (pạhilakʼ·dosar·tesar + Rom sec jạhạj cạlạu + chuṭ tayom) khon mitʼ bachaꞌ me ar hor talare olakan ciṭhiko lo Aposkạmi reakʼ kạmiko atiꞌ me.
s.foot: Moṛ · Ṭhạuko do Bible katha ar sadhạron Bible bhugol lekateye menakʼa (jaega jaega teheń reakʼ ńutum lo). Doreạ dạerạ, gaḍa ar doreạ do khulạ bhugol data (Natural Earth) khon aḍgoꞌakana, saral ocoakana.

eden.name: Eden (Sirjon · Gisạu)
eden.note: Tahẽn kahõ bhage benao akan jogotre, kại do bolena ar Isor ar manwa talare reakʼ somondhoe raputʼa.
events: Turuy mãhãte sirjon — “tahẽn kahõ bhage”
Manwa do Isor reakʼ chobireye benaoena
Gisạu, ar Eden khon ucạṛ
Pạhilakʼ susamacar bachan — “maejiu reakʼ bõs do biń reakʼ bohokʼe gejera”

noah.name: Ararat (Daꞌ Bạṛ)
noah.today: teheń reakʼ purbo Turki reakʼ Ararat Buru
noah.note: Isor do kại te perej akan jogote bicạra, enrehõ mitʼ pạrisạd hotete jiwie bańcaoa.
events: Bigṛao te perej akan jogot
Daꞌ bạṛ, ar Noa reakʼ jạhạj
Dhonu reakʼ niyom — “aronaꞌ daꞌ bạṛte ọt bae ḍakniakʼa”

babel.name: Babel reakʼ Munara
babel.note: Sorge hạbicʼ tẽhẽnakʼ maraṅ mon reakʼ birudhe, Isor do onkoakʼ aṛang ar hoṛkoe ọt sạote cạrhạukoa.
events: “Dela mitʼ nagar ar munara… ar abo lạgitʼ ńutumbon benaoa”
Isor do onkoakʼ aṛange gaḍbaḍa
Hoṛko dhạrti sạote cạrhạuena (Sinar — tayom Babel)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Bible reakʼ bańcao kahni do mitʼ hoṛ reakʼ haka te ehopʼa.
events: Isor do Abram ke Kaldiạ reakʼ Ur khon haka koa
“Am khon mitʼ maraṅ jạtiń benaokoa… am iạte sanam jạtrenko bhorko ńama”
Pạtiạu te acʼakʼ oṛakʼ disạme bagiada

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: Hor talare, bachan reakʼ disạm sec haka reakʼ jobap.
events: Terah reakʼ pạrisạd Haranreye tãhena
Terah gujukʼa
Abram 75 umerre Kanan sece oḍoꞌa

shechem.name: Sikem · Kanan
shechem.note: Bachan reakʼ disạmre mitʼ pạrisạd thirena ar niyom do seyad khon seyad calakʼa.
events: Kananre bolkate, pạhilakʼ bedi — “amakʼ bõs ko ińiń noa ọt emakoa”
Niyom (Genesis 15) · Ishak · Jakob
Jakob reakʼ gel-bar hopon — gel-bar goṣṭi reakʼ moṛ

egypt.name: Misor (Gosen)
egypt.note: Mitʼ pạrisạd maraṅ jạte hoyena — ar tayom golam jạt.
events: Akir akan Josep do Misor reakʼ sasoke hoyena
Jakob reakʼ goṭa pạrisạd bhukmạri khon bańcao lạgitʼ Misore adoꞌ ena
Haraꞌ kana Israel jạt do golam ocoyena

sinai.name: Sinai Buru
sinai.note: Purạn Niyom reakʼ ṭhonok bańcao — golamko Isor acʼren hoṛko hoyena.
events: Gel ṭa maraṅ dukh ar Niskạr reakʼ mereꞌ
Aṛaꞌ Doreạ hạkʼena ar onko parom ena
Gel ṭa Ạn, niyom, dạrạm oṛakʼ ar bọlị

kadesh.name: Kades (ọtạr)
kadesh.note: Baeꞌ pạtiạu iạte mitʼ janam do disạm ạdila — enrehõ Isor onko loe tãhena.
events: Gel-bar gupti hoṛ — menkhan hoṛko bharosạ bako sana
Ọtạrre 38 serma — manna, daepoṛ ar singal
Moab reakʼ maidanre, Mosa reakʼ mucạtʼ upodes (Dosar Biboron)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Mucạtʼre onko bola ar bachan reakʼ disạmko hataoa.
events: Jordon hạkʼena ar hoṛko parom ena
Jeriko reakʼ pạcil urạꞌ ena
Kanan jit ar disạm haṭiń

shiloh.name: Silo (Bikʼcạrko)
shiloh.note: Raja bãṅte, joto hoṛ acʼ sana lekako kạmiyetʼa — mitʼ sạri raja jaruri.
events: Dạrạm oṛakʼ Silore thirena
Kại–duk–bańcao reakʼ cokkor (Debora, Gideon, Samson)
Rut — nãgạ dinre biswạs, Dạud reakʼ bõsre

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem · Mitʼdom Rajosṭi
jerusalem.note: Israel reakʼ sona okte — ar jaejug raja reakʼ bachan.
events: Pạhilakʼ raja Saul, tayom Dạud ar Goliat
Dạud lo niyom — “amakʼ siṅghạson jaejug” (2 Samuel 7)
Solomon Jerusalemre mondire benaoa

samaria.name: Samariạ · Haṭiń Rajosṭi
samaria.note: Rajosṭi haṭińa ar latar seceye senokʼa, nạbiko rakʼ tãhenrehõ.
events: Solomon tayom, Jihudạ ar Israelre haṭiń
Doharaꞌ murti pujạ
Eliạ, Jesaea, Jirimiạ “ruạṛpe” rakʼa — ar Mạsi reakʼ bachanko emaꞌa

nineveh.name: Ninewe (Assuriạ)
nineveh.note: Joto cetạu bagikate, uttor sec laharegeye uṛukʼa.
events: Ninewe, Assuriạ reakʼ rajdhạni
Uttor rajosṭi Assuriạ samaṅreye uṛukʼa (722 P.K.)
Jona Ninewe seceye kollena

babylon.name: Babel
babylon.note: Joto khon nãgạ ńidạ — enrehõ aronaꞌ thir reakʼ bachan tẽhẽna.
events: Jerusalem uṛukʼa, mondir jul ena (586 P.K.)
Jihudạ Babel seceko idiyetʼkoa
Daniel ar Jeheskel — bandi okolre pạtiạu ar daroson

susa.name: Susa (Persiạ)
susa.note: Baṅ pạtiạukiạ raj reakʼ ṭhonokre hõ, Isor acʼren hoṛkoe jogaokoa.
events: Persiạ Babele haraea
Ester Jiukoe bińạs khon bańcaokoa
Nehemiạ raja samaṅre bintikate kolakana

return.name: Jerusalem Ruạṛ
return.note: Onkoko ruạṛ ar aronaꞌko benaoa — menkhan raja bae hijukʼa. Onko Mạsiako tẽtaṅ.
events: Kuros reakʼ hukum te pe ḍapre ruạṛ (Jerubabel 538 · Esra 458 · Nehemiạ 444)
Mondir aronaꞌ benao ar Jerusalem pạcil thir
Malaki — Purạn Niyom mucạꞌa: “ińren goḍetiń kolekana”

bethlehem.name: Betlehem
bethlehem.note: Bachan akan Mạsi do Dạud reakʼ nagare hecʼa — Bachan do manwae hoyena.
events: Dạud reakʼ nagar Betlehemre janamena
Duta hoṛko gupiꞌ hoṛ ṭhen khobore emkoa
Guni hoṛko manạu emaꞌ lạgitʼko hijukʼa

nazareth.name: Najaret
nazareth.note: Isor do sadhạron nagarre manwa lekae harakʼa.
events: Mistri reakʼ oṛakʼreye harakʼena
Gel-bar umerre, mondirre kukli ar jobap
Tayom acʼakʼ nagar reakʼ sabhạ oṛakʼreye bagilena

jordan.name: Jordon Gaḍa
jordan.note: Uniyakʼ herel kạmi ehopʼa — sorge uni ke Hopon lekateye thir ocoea.
events: Johan hotete bodredạn ńama
Atmạ paṛwa leka aḍgoꞌa — “noa iń dulạṛ Hopon kana”
Ọtạrre Soetan reakʼ pe ṭa jãhca haraea

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Acʼakʼ pạhilakʼ cinhạre uniyakʼ mọhịmạe udukʼa.
events: Mitʼ bapla re pạhuna
Daꞌ do angur ras hoyena — uniyakʼ pạhilakʼ cinhạ
Acʼren celạko uni reko pạtiạua

sychar.name: Sukar (Samariạ)
sychar.note: Etohopʼ kạmi reakʼ hor — Jerusalem hotete duṛup akan Samariạ hạbicʼ.
events: Jerusalemre mondire sạphạ ocoea
Ńidạre, Nikodemus — “am do aronaꞌ janampe hoyokʼ jaruri”
Samariạni maejiu ke jiwit dakʼ emaea

capernaum.name: Kapernahum
capernaum.note: Galil kạmi reakʼ ghạr — haka, sikhạu ar birudhta noṭe jharoꞌa.
events: Hakuꞌ dorko haka koa ar noṭe thirena
Buru reakʼ upodes — “Atmạre gạrib hoṛko do dhonbạd”
Raj reakʼ ạuri kahni — ar haraꞌ birudhta

galilee.name: Galil Doreạ
galilee.note: Prokriti cetan ektiạr te uni okoe kana ona udukʼa.
events: “Sãt taheńme, cupme” — uni hoyoke thir ocoea
Mọ̃ṛɛ̃ ṭa ḍahi ar bar ṭa hakute 5,000 hoṛe jom ocokoa
Daꞌ cetanteye cạlạua

caesarea_p.name: Kaisariạ Philippi
caesarea_p.note: Celạko bujhạua uni do Mạsi kana, ar kurus reakʼ hore uṛạꞌa.
events: Petrus reakʼ maności — “Am do Mạsi kanam, jiwit Isor reakʼ Hopon”
Laharege acʼakʼ moron ar aronaꞌ jiwit reakʼ bachaneda
Buru cetanre mọhịmạteye badolena

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Jerusalem sec rakap horre, adakʼ akankoe sẽndrakoa.
events: Kạṇạ Bartimaeus ke mẽtʼe emaea
Kar toloꞌ Jakkheus ke haka koa
“Hoṛ reakʼ Hopon do adakʼ akankoe sẽndra ar bańcao lạgitʼe hijukʼlena”

bethany.name: Betania
bethany.note: Acʼakʼ mucạtʼ hạptạ laharekʼ, moron cetan ektiạre udukʼa.
events: Lạjạrus ke goc̈ khon jiwit ocoea — “Iń do aronaꞌ jiwit ar jiwiń kana”
Mariam uni ke tọpạ lạgitʼ sunume juṛ aea
Noa cinhạ uni ke goc̈ reakʼ monsubạe jọr ocoea

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Goṭa Bible oka sece udukʼa ona ucạṛ — kurus, aronaꞌ jiwit, sorge rakapʼ.
events: Jitkạr te bola; aronaꞌ mondir reakʼ mej ọloṭ aea
Mucạtʼ Jom okte celạ reakʼ jaṅgae abenaea
Kurusreye gujukʼa
Tesar mãhãre jiwitokʼa, tayom sorgeye rakapʼa

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Kul akan mondoli okare Anjati kạmi ehopʼa ar ruạṛa.
events: Bintire Atmạ Barnabas ar Saul ke alag ocokoa
Mondoli okare pạtiạukiạ pạhilte “Khristiạn”ko metaena
Pạhilakʼ, dosar ar tesar cạlạu reakʼ ehopʼ ṭhạu

seleucia.name: Selukia
seleucia.note: Antiokia reakʼ bondor — onko Kupros sece jạhạj te cạlạua.

salamis.name: Salamis (Kupros)
salamis.note: Kupros reakʼ pạhilakʼ ṭhạu — sabhạ oṛakʼko re prạcạr.

paphos.name: Paphos
paphos.note: Susamacar birudh hoṛko birudhte ektiạre udukʼa.
events: Jạdukor Elimas kạṇạ hoyena
Sasok Sergius Paulus pạtiạua
Noṭe khon “Pạul” laharge idiyetʼa

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Pamphuliạ reakʼ mitʼ bondor — noṭe Johan Mark ruạṛena.

pantioch.name: Pisidiạ reakʼ Antiokia
events: Sabhạ oṛakʼre bańcao itihạs reakʼ jạri upodes
Ḍher Anjatiko rạskạ te bachane hataoa
Birudhta te oḍoꞌ ocoyena

iconium.name: Ikonia
iconium.note: Ḍherko pạtiạua, menkhan taṛam te laharge cạlạua.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Isor lekate manạua, tayom dhirite cạbọka.
events: Janam khon lãd hoṛe bhalạe ocoea
Hoṛko onkin ke isor lekate bọlị emaꞌ lạgitʼko sana
Dhirite cạbọk ar gujukʼ leka bagi ena, uni birdạꞌa

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Ḍher celạko benaoa; mondoliko jọr ocoꞌ lạgitʼ hor ruạṛ te calakʼa.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Susamacar laharge Europ sece senokʼ reakʼ badol ṭhạu.
events: Makidoniạ reakʼ mitʼ herel reakʼ daroson
“Parom hecʼkate ale lạgọṛ leme”
Onko takingege Europ sece parom ena

philippi.name: Philippi
philippi.book: Aposkạmi 16 · Philippiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi
philippi.note: Europ reakʼ pạhilakʼ mondoli — bandi oṛakʼre hõ susamacar jita.
events: Baiganiạ bãpạri Lidiạ pạtiạua
Mena udukʼ kạmiạ kạmin ḍangṛi chuṭ ńama
Tal ńidạ kirtan, ọt ur, bandi ghạr goḍetiạ reakʼ pạrisạd bańcao

thess.name: Thessalonika
thess.book: Aposkạmi 17 · 1–2 Thessalonikiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi
thess.note: Bachan do nagare hulhulaea ar birudhta ur oṛoꞌa.
events: Pe Sạbat sabhạ oṛakʼreye jotạua
“Noa hoṛko jogot latạ ọloṭ akadako”
Onko ńidạteye tọpạ ọdọka

berea.name: Berea
events: Rạskạ te bachanko hataoa
Dinmạ bachan sạri kana se baṅ sostorko pạrọba
Ḍherko pạtiạu sece hijukʼa

athens.name: Athens
athens.note: Gian hoṛko reakʼ nagarre uni “baṅ baḍaeakan Isor” reakʼe prạcạra.
events: Murti te perej akan nagar uni ke duke ocoea
Areopagusre Sirjạuniạ ar aronaꞌ jiwit reakʼe prạcạra
Landha ena, enrehõ kotoꞌ hoṛ pạtiạua

corinth.name: Korinth
corinth.note: Mitʼ serma tanạṅ noṭeye tãhena, kại reakʼ nagarre mondolie thirkeda.
events: Akwila ar Priskilla lo kãṭa oṛakʼ benaoa
“Alom borea… cedakʼna iń am loń menakʼa”
Ḍher Korinthiko pạtiạu ar bodredạn ńama

ephesus.name: Ephesus
ephesus.book: Aposkạmi 19 · Ephesiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi
ephesus.note: Tesar cạlạu reakʼ ṭhonok — bachan Asia sạote pasnaoa.
events: Turannus reakʼ oṛakʼre bar serma dinmạ sikhạu
Jạdu pũthiko juli; jọr kạmiko
Rupạ mistri Demetrius hulgul ocoea

miletus.name: Miletus
miletus.note: Ephesus reakʼ prạcin hoṛko lo mẽtʼ dakʼte bidạe.
events: “Acʼ reaṅ mayte kirińakan mondoli reakʼ joton lem”
Prạcinko rakʼa, uni ke ar bako ńela mente baḍaekate

caesarea.name: Kaisariạ
caesarea.note: Bar serma sasok ar raja samaṅre susamacare bãcạua.
events: Sasok Feliks ar Festus samaṅre bicạr
Agrippa raja samaṅre acʼ babote bãcạua
“Kaisar ṭhen appil ińetʼa” — Rom sece

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Mondirre sạbọk ena, uniyakʼ bandi hor ehopʼa.
events: Mondirre hoṛ jotạw te sạbọk ena
Bicạr durbạr samaṅre acʼ babote bãcạua
Rom reakʼ nagariạ lekate, jạgoạl te Kaisariạ seceye kolakana

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Rom sec cạlạu Aleksandriạ reakʼ jạhạj reko badola.

fairhaven.name: Bhage Bondor (Krit)
fairhaven.note: Jạhạj rọkʼ lạgitʼ Pạul reakʼ cetạu bako ańjoma.

crete.name: Krit
crete.note: Chuṭ tayom, noa dwipre uni Titus ke mondoli sạjạu lạgitʼe bagiada.
events: Joto nagarre prạcin bahal lạgitʼ Titus ke bagiada
Dosạ bãṅ, biswạsi agua hoṛ kula
Titus lạgitʼ ciṭhie olkeda

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Bạhọ ar jạhạj raheꞌ talate hõ, Isor reakʼ bachan thirena.
events: “Uttor-purbo hoyo” jạhạj raheꞌ ocoea, enrehõ joto 276 hoṛ bańcaoa
Biń huṛạꞌaea, enrehõ uni ke jãhã bae hoyena
Dwip reakʼ hasu hoṛko bhalạe ocokoa

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Italire lạhạꞌre onko seṭera ar pạtiạukiạ boehako ńamkoa.

rome.name: Rom
rome.note: Mucạtʼre susamacar raj reakʼ ṭhonok hạbicʼ seṭera — mucạꞌ do baṅ bickom ehopʼ.
events: Bar serma oṛakʼ bandire, Isor reakʼ raje bahadur te prạcạra
Noṭe khon Bandi Ciṭhiko olkeda (Eph·Phil·Kol·Phm)
Tayom aronaꞌ bandi ena, 2Timothie olkeda ar gọj ena — “Iń bhage lạṛại lạṛại akadiń, dạṛ purạu akadiń”
